title: Drop Version
description: A historical version of a drop. Each drop is limited to 5 stored versions.

version.description: Monotonically increasing version number for the drop.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this version was created.

payload.description: Payload for this version (same format rules as the current drop).

iv.description: Hex-encoded 12-byte AES-GCM IV used for this version. Null for public drops.
